page_info.title: Digital Beamforming
page_info.keywords: digital beamforming, phased array, multibeam, uhf, ka band, adef
page_info.description: ADI offers digital beamforming solutions with growing portfolio of up/downconverters, GaN power amplifiers and T/R modules, c
page_info.component_overview: High speed converters with integrated, hardened DSP and sampling rates up to 10.25 GSPS are bringing processing closer to the edge and making digital beamforming a commercial reality—from UHF to Ka band using direct Sampling or up/downconversion.
page_info.navigation_path: 主页/解决方案概要/航空航天和防务/相控阵/Digital Beamforming

value_and_benefits.title: The Value of Digital Beamforming
value_and_benefits.contents: ADI’s digital beamforming technology enables lower power, more capable DBF phased arrays for reduced RF design time, streamlined bill of materials, and new capabilities like simultaneous, multibeam operation and improved MIMO data links.
